patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Rogue Frontier Patch 5
description: Rogue Frontier Patch 5 Combat Balance Changes (7 April 2025) — Axes, Crossbows, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Frost Staffs, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Spears, Swords, War Gloves, Armors, Capes, Potions, Other.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Bloody Reap Infernal Scythe Raging Blades Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Daggers Blood Ritual Demonfang Ring of Death Twin Slayers Fire Staffs Raging Flare Frost Staffs Frost Frozen Hell Icicle Staff Ice Crystal Permafrost Prism Hammers Ground Pound Grovekeeper Holy Staffs Sanctify Exalted Staff Maces Eye of the Storm Dreadstorm Monarch Vendetta Camlann Mace Nature Staffs Protection of Nature Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Black Monk Stave Soul Shaker Grailseeker Tornado Soulscythe Spears Cripple Swords Blade Cyclone War Gloves Hundred Striking Fists Ursine Maulers Infernal Boulder Hellfire Hands Armors Protection of the Fiends Demon Armor Taunt Plate Armors Capes Untouchable Fort Sterling Cape Potions Invisibility Potion Other Judgment Lightcaller

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Bloody Reap Infernal Scythe 2nd swing 3 ticks 2s below 40% 85 220 255 above 40% 47 120 141 Raging Blades Radius 6m 5m

changes.raw_text: Bloody Reap: 2nd swing now deals damage in 3 ticks over 2 seconds (doesn't stack). Damage per tick below 40%: 85 (total 220 → 255). Damage per tick above 40%: 47 (total 120 → 141).
notes: 2nd swing now deals damage in 3 ticks over 2 seconds (doesn't stack)
Damage per tick below 40%: 85; Damage per tick above 40%: 47

changes.raw_text: Raging Blades: Radius: 6m → 5m

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Channel duration 3.3s 2.6s Total ticks 11 9 Damage per tick players 96 117 mobs 57 70 Initial tick 0.2s 0.1s

changes.raw_text: Divine Engine: Channel duration: 3.3s → 2.6s (Total ticks: 11 → 9); Damage per tick vs players: 96 → 117; vs mobs: 57 → 70; Initial tick: 0.2s → 0.1s

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Blood Ritual Demonfang Damage per cast 106 112 Ring of Death Twin Slayers 1st cast cooldown 25s 15s Energy cost 12 10

changes.raw_text: Blood Ritual: Damage per cast: 106 → 112
Ring of Death: 1st cast cooldown: 25s → 15s; Energy cost: 12 → 10

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Raging Flare Cast time 0.6s 0.4s Impact damage 186 205 DoT ticks 6 3 DoT damage per tick 7.2 21.4 Total DoT 43.2 64.2

changes.raw_text: Raging Flare: Cast time: 0.6s → 0.4s; Impact damage: 186 → 205; DoT ticks: 6 → 3 (1s interval unchanged); DoT damage per tick: 7.2 → 21.4; Total DoT damage: 43.2 → 64.2

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frost Stack requirement 5 4 Frozen Hell Icicle Staff Hit delay 0.7s 0.3s Ice Crystal Permafrost Prism Damage 184.69 173 Stun duration ignores diminishing returns no longer refreshes

changes.raw_text: Frost: Stack requirement: 5 → 4
Frozen Hell: Hit delay: 0.7s → 0.3s
Ice Crystal: Damage: 184.69 → 173; Stun duration now ignores diminishing returns (but does not apply it); Stun duration no longer refreshes by consecutive Ice Crystal stuns.
notes: Stun duration now ignores diminishing returns (but does not apply it)
Stun duration no longer refreshes by consecutive Ice Crystal stuns

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Ground Pound Grovekeeper Removed increased resistances Added knock-up 1-3 enemies 0.4s 4-6 0.8s 7+ 1.2s

changes.raw_text: Ground Pound: Removed: Increased resistances per targets hit. Added: Knocks up all targets for a duration based on the amount of enemies hit: 1-3 enemies: 0.4s; 4-6: 0.8s; 7+: 1.2s.
notes: Removed: Increased resistances per targets hit
Added: Knock-up based on enemies hit — 1-3: 0.4s; 4-6: 0.8s; 7+: 1.2s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sanctify Exalted Staff Cast time 1s 0.6s

changes.raw_text: Sanctify: Cast time: 1s → 0.6s

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Eye of the Storm Dreadstorm Monarch Resistance reduction 0.15 0.18 Vendetta Camlann Mace Hit delay 1.5s 1.2s

changes.raw_text: Eye of the Storm: Resistance reduction: 0.15 → 0.18
Vendetta: Hit delay: 1.5s → 1.2s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Protection of Nature Resistance 0.24 0.2

changes.raw_text: Protection of Nature: Resistance: 0.24 → 0.2

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Black Monk Stave Damage reduction 22% 30% Duration 6s 5s Initial tick 0.25s 0.1s Projectile speed 30 35 Soul Shaker Grailseeker Area duration 4s 3.5s Root duration 3s 3.5s Tornado Soulscythe Standtime 0.7s 0.4s

changes.raw_text: Fatal Blade: Damage reduction (vs. players): 22% → 30%; Duration: 6s → 5s; Initial tick: 0.25s → 0.1s; Projectile speed: 30m/s → 35m/s
Soul Shaker: Area duration: 4s → 3.5s; Root duration: 3s → 3.5s
Tornado: Standtime: 0.7s → 0.4s

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Cripple Damage type magical physical Auto-attack speed 25% 4s Cooldown 20s 18s Move speed buff 5s 4s no longer bonus damage purging sprint

changes.raw_text: Cripple: Damage type: magical → physical; Added: Auto-attack speed reduced by 25% for 4s; Cooldown: 20s → 18s; Move speed buff duration: 5s → 4s; No longer gives bonus damage when purging a sprint.
notes: Added: Auto-attack speed is reduced by 25% for 4s
No longer gives bonus damage when purging a sprint

changes.raw_text: Blade Cyclone: 1 charge damage: 70 → 60

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Hundred Striking Fists Ursine Maulers Damage per tick 32.4 36 players Delayed damage 27 30 per stack Infernal Boulder Hellfire Hands 1st boulder 199.5 177 2nd 133 126 3rd 66.5 76 DoT tick 14 18

changes.raw_text: Hundred Striking Fists: Damage per tick: 32.4 → 36 (vs players); Delayed damage: 27 → 30 (per stack)
Infernal Boulder: 1st boulder: 199.5 → 177; 2nd boulder: 133 → 126; 3rd boulder: 66.5 → 76; DoT tick damage: 14 → 18

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Protection of the Fiends Demon Armor Caster resistance reduction 0.34 0.37 Taunt Plate Armors no longer distinguishes target types Bonus Damage 10% 20% Defense vs Players -10% -20%

changes.raw_text: Protection of the Fiends: Caster resistance reduction: 0.34 → 0.37
Taunt: No longer distinguishes between target types. Bonus Damage vs All: 10% → 20%; Defense vs Players: -10% → -20%.
notes: No longer distinguishes between target types

subsections.heading: Capes
subsections.searchable_text: Capes Untouchable Fort Sterling Cape Base cooldown 139 168 Cooldown reduction 3s 8s 118s 112s 700IP 91s 40s 1600IP

changes.raw_text: Untouchable: Base cooldown: 139 → 168; Cooldown reduction per 100 IP: 3s → 8s (118s → 112s at 700 IP; 91s → 40s at 1600 IP)

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Invisibility Potion Ability damage reduction Damage vs All -50% While Invisible 2s after revealed

changes.raw_text: Invisibility Potion: Ability damage reduction → Damage vs All reduction (-50% value unchanged). Duration: Fixed time on cast → While Invisible, and remaining for 2s once revealed.
notes: Damage reduction type changed: Ability damage reduction → Damage vs All reduction (-50% value unchanged)
Duration changed: Fixed time on cast → While Invisible, and remaining for 2s once revealed

subsections.heading: Other
subsections.searchable_text: Other Judgment Lightcaller visuals updated large-scale fights

changes.raw_text: Judgment (Lightcaller): Visuals have been updated to be more readable in large-scale fights
notes: Visuals updated to be more readable in large-scale fights
